what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record that links the design-assets channel to a specific dragnet run target via a run:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a leading and trailing --- block
References an external resource with a run:// URI
Attachment record is stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/
concerns: No descriptive content about what the dragnet run produced
Target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone
No stated reason for attaching this particular run
notes: A minimal, timestamped provenance stub that ties the design-assets channel to a dragnet run reference.
questions: What artifacts or results did the dragnet run at the target URI produce?
Why was this specific run attached to the design-assets channel?
What does the run:// URI resolve to in the corpus?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's type and target fields indicate it should link a channel to a dragnet run, and it does exactly that as a bare reference record.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create an auditable, retrievable association between a channel and a specific dragnet run without embedding the run's contents.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link from a channel memory entry to an external dragnet run, preserving provenance and discoverability while keeping the attachment lightweight.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata record for the design-assets channel referencing dragnet run run://corpus/company/dragnet/design-assets/1782131182 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to associate the design-assets channel with a specific dragnet run for later retrieval and provenance tracking.
